name: superchuck
description: Chief-of-staff orchestrator skills for Codex CLI — Chuck's fork of ECC with subscription-only integration.

interface.shortDescription: Chief-of-staff orchestrator skills for Codex CLI (subscription-only fork of ECC).
interface.longDescription: Superchuck is Chuck's fork of Everything Claude Code (ECC), rebuilt as a chief-of-staff orchestrator. All model access is via Claude Code and Codex CLI subscriptions — no API tokens.
defaultPrompt: Use the tdd-workflow skill to write tests before implementation.
Use the security-review skill to scan for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
Use the verification-loop skill to verify correctness before shipping changes.
